name: Defense of the Temple
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殿</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Fusion Summon 1 EARTH Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If you use a monster you control that mentions "Temple of the Kings", you can also use face-up monsters your opponent controls as material. If you control "Temple of the Kings": You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Dangers of the Divine" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Defense of the Temple" once per turn.
eff: Fusion Summon 1 EARTH Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. If you use a monster you control that mentions "Temple of the Kings", you can also use face-up monsters your opponent controls as material. If you control "Temple of the Kings": You can banish this card from your GY; add 1 "Dangers of the Divine" from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Defense of the Temple" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Sends from your opponent's field to your opponent's Graveyard
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the opponent's field as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
